channel.title: Nosql on Qianqian Shan
channel.description: Recent content in Nosql on Qianqian Shan

item.title: SQL Basics
item.description: Basic Concepts Database: A container (usually a file or a set of files) to store organized data. Table: A structured list of data of a specific type. Every table in the database has a unique name that identifies it. Schema: Information about database and table layout and properties. For example, information that how data is stored in them, what data is stored , how it’s broken up etc. Primary Keys: A column(or a set of columns) whose value uniquely identify every row in a table.
